description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 10th; Weight 12 lbs.; Price 11,320 gp DESCRIPTION The blade of this +1 keen greataxe is carved from jet-black obsidian. When the wielder charges an enemy, he receives a +10 foot enhancement bonus to his speed that round. Once per day, he can command the axe to grant all allies within 30 feet a +10 foot enhancement bonus to base speed for 1 round. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells expeditious retreat, keen edge; Cost 5,802 gp
